questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the brochure.
City A: museums and historical streets
City B: beaches and nightlife
Question: Which city suits a history lover?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Historical streets ve museums City A'dadır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Read the travel plan.
Day 4: Anıtkabir and museum
Day 5: old town walk and local market
Question: What is the focus of this trip?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Plan kültür ve tarih ağırlıklıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Read the hotel info.
Hotel Sun: 1203 TL/night
Hotel River: 953 TL/night
Question: Which hotel is cheaper?
questions.explanation:
953 TL daha düşük fiyattır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the dialogue.
Tourist: I have only one evening. What should I do?
Local: You should join the old town night tour.
Question: Local person is ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — You should ifadesi tavsiye işlevi görür.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Read the flyer.
"Museum Pass: valid for 75 hours, entry to 9 museums, skip-the-line access."
Question: What is one advantage?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Skip-the-line ifadesi sıra beklememeyi anlatır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the review.
"City center was beautiful, but transport was confusing for first-time visitors."
Question: Which mixed opinion is given?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Olumlu yön şehir merkezi, olumsuz yön ulaşım olarak verilmiş.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the family context.
They need a calm place, short walking distances and early dinner options for their child.
Question: Which destination is best?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Quiet coastal town with family hotels
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Aile ihtiyaçlarını karşılayan tek seçenek sakin aile otelleridir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Read the itinerary.
12:00 city tour bus
15:33 lunch break
17:00 river cruise
Question: What comes right after lunch?
questions.explanation:
Lunch'tan sonra 17:00 river cruise var.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the message.
"Our flight was delayed, so we moved the museum visit to tomorrow morning."
Question: What did they do?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Bought new tickets only
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Moved to tomorrow morning ifadesi yeniden planlamadır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the goal.
A student wants to improve English and learn local culture during summer.
Question: Which option matches both goals?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Staying alone in a remote cabin
Ek Soru 1 — Joining an international language camp in a historic town
Ek Soru 1 — Watching only online videos
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Dil kampı ve tarihi şehir birlikte iki hedefi karşılar.

[GitHub Ek Test — Tourism]
questions.ipucu: İki hedefi aynı anda sağlayan seçeneği bul.
